LXX were cast before Haman—a day and month—and the lot fell on the fourteenth of the month of Adar ; Hebrew were cast before Haman a day and month—the twelfth, Adar ; the month of Adar (also in verse 13) is the twelfth month of the Hebrew lunar calendar, usually occurring within the months of February and March.
